prestazioni: Engine swap to a Fiat-Lancia Twin-Cam 2.0L 16V (engine code: 831A3.000) with forged internals: JE 87mm forged pistons, Cunningham rods, and a billet crankshaft, paired with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Aviaid for sustained high-RPM endurance (redline at 9,000 RPM).

Forced induction via a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (86mm compressor wheel) with a custom cast-iron exhaust manifold by Tubistyle, feeding into a 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom intercooler setup by Bell Intercoolers (front-mount, 12-row core).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (2-way adjustable dampers) and custom polybushings by SuperPro for the rear trailing arms, paired with a fully adjustable rear anti-roll bar by Whiteline (24mm) and a front strut tower brace by Cusco (Type-RS).
estetica: Full carbon fiber body conversion using a custom-made kit by Zender (1980s Group 5-inspired widebody fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser), with a single-piece carbon fiber hood by Seibon (vented for intercooler clearance).
Retro-futuristic livery inspired by the Lancia Martini Racing colors, applied with 3M 1080 vinyl in a custom geometric pattern by VViViD Vinyl Wraps, including gold-accented pinstriping by 1Shot.

OMP Corsica racing seats (carbon fiber shell) with custom Alcantara upholstery by Recaro, paired with a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in, with integrated harness bar).
